title: Pulhamus
compiled_truth: Pulhamus is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2000-06-01 to 2001-11-27), Pulhamus sent 20 and received 56 emails, totalling 76 interactions. Top correspondents: [Egongert](people/egongert-aol) (11), [B2Nusbaum](people/b2nusbaum-qwest) (9), [Mbp1832](people/mbp1832-aol) (9), [Mary Pulhamus](people/mary-pulhamus-colorado) (8), [Tlenhart](people/tlenhart-corealty) (7).
